data.name: Ksenia

weaponImprint.name: Stechkin
weaponImprint.trait: Basic attack range is increased by 1 tile, gains 1 point of Confectance Index after attacking.
weaponImprint.effect: After applying a buff to an allied target, increase healing and damage dealt by the next active skill by 5%/7%/9%/11%/13%/15%. If this is an attack buff, gain an additional 5% increase, with a 50%/60%/70%/80%/90%/100% chance to apply 1 additional buff. This effect can trigger at most once per turn.

data.effects: A Doll with an unusual obsession with making money, she finds a sense of security by working hard to earn it and then spending it all. However, the time she spends working with her reliable companions is equally her treasure.

skills.name: Special Discount
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Passion for Shopping
skills.description: When an enemy unit within range receives targeted damage from an allied unit, prioritizes performing 1 instance of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], dealing Physical damage equal to 80% of attack and 3 points of stability damage to the enemy unit, and applies [effect:6d138a9f-2068-42d9-9ecb-bfd3000a4ac8] to the allied unit for 2 turns. This can be triggered once per turn. When under the effects of [effect:d5571913-f803-4fc4-b716-d0d2f156dbbe], stability damage is increased by 1 point. At the end of the action, grants 1 point of Confectance Index for each Burn buff.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: When under the effects of [effect:6d138a9f-2068-42d9-9ecb-bfd3000a4ac8], increases stability damage dealt by 1 point.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: The maximum amount of times that [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] can trigger increases by 1.

skills.name: Favorable Cycle
skills.description: Select 1 enemy target within 6 tiles, deal physical damage equal to 75% of attack to it and apply 2 stacks of [effect:6f14204f-abba-469b-b056-ca1588d14104]. If under the effect of 2 or more Burn buffs, perform an additional attack on the original target, dealing Burn damage equal to 75% of attack and 2 stability damage.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Apply [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] for 1 turn after the first attack.

skills.name: Comprehensive Rescue
skills.description: Selects 1 allied target within 6 tiles, restoring HP equal to 130% of attack, 2 points of stability index, and applies [effect:d5571913-f803-4fc4-b716-d0d2f156dbbe]. If the target's HP is fully restored after healing, applies [effect:6d138a9f-2068-42d9-9ecb-bfd3000a4ac8] for 2 turns.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: If the target's HP is fully restored after healing and wasn't full before that, additionally restores 2 points of their stability index.

skills.name: The Secret to Making Money
skills.description: The user gains [effect:d5571913-f803-4fc4-b716-d0d2f156dbbe] and [effect:6d138a9f-2068-42d9-9ecb-bfd3000a4ac8] for 2 turns. Select 1 enemy target within 6 tiles and deal Burn damage equal to 160% of attack to it.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: If a phase weakness is exploited, increases damage dealt by 20%.
vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.vertebraeName: The Secret to Making Money Lv.2

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: When attacking targets with [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a], increase critical rate by 100%.
vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.vertebraeName: The Secret to Making Money Lv.3

keys.effect: When applying a Burn buff, there is a 50% chance to apply 1 additional buff to the target for 1 turn.
At the end of this unit's action, restores 2 points of stability to the allied unit with the lowest stability.
When healing an allied target other than the user, applies 1 random buff to them and the user.
When using Favorable Cycle, for each kill made, increases the maximum number of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] uses this turn by 1.
After dealing Burn damage, restores HP equal to 10% of damage and 1 point of stability index.
When using Comprehensive Rescue, the user gains the same buffs.
When applying a Burn buff, additionally cleanses 1 debuff.
If the user possesses [effect:d5571913-f803-4fc4-b716-d0d2f156dbbe] at the end of the action, gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

vertebrae.effect: Apply [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] for 1 turn after the first attack.

imagoforms.effect: For every instance of Burn damage dealt by this unit, Burn damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 1%, maximum of 3%. Does not stack.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Burn damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 4% maximum of 3 stacks. The effect's potency is progressively reduced by 1% each time a new stack is applied.
Attack and max HP is increased by 4%.
At the start of the battle, the 2 allied units with the highest attack have their attack increased by 3%. Does not stack.
